name_cn:
ꫛꫀꪝ
A new member of the puzzle pebbled leather family. Ah, the color of spring. Minimalist and atmospheric geometric design, sweet yet salty. Custom pebbled calfskin, cotton-linen lining. Mini size with a small body but large capacity. 📱📱 Lipsticks and powders fit in with no pressure. Size: 18*11*7.5cm
